title: Parental, gestational, and early-life exposure to indoor environmental hazardous factors on allergic rhinitis among preschool children in Urumqi City: a case-control study.
ehr_evidence: None. The study used parental reports and kindergarten-based selection.
summary: A case-control study investigating the association between early-life indoor environmental factors and allergic rhinitis (AR) in preschool children in Urumqi City, China.
key_findings: Mother with newly purchased furniture during pregnancy (OR=1.49)
captured_features: Indoor environmental correlates of maternal exposure
population: Preschool children in Urumqi City, China
data_availability_statement: The datasets generated and/or analyzed during the current study are not publicly available due to the data belonging to the School of Public Health of Fudan University but are available from the corresponding author upon reasonable request.
